Class UserSession

java.lang.Object
com.example.airlinereervationsystem.models.UserSession
public class UserSession extends Object
Manages the global state and active session data for the Airline Reservation System. This utility class utilizes static members to maintain session persistence (e.g., the currently authenticated user and the actively selected flight) across various JavaFX scenes and controllers.

OOP invalid input: '&' Design Concepts Demonstrated:

  • Static Class Pattern: Uses static fields and methods to allow global access to session states without requiring class instantiation.
  • Encapsulation: Session data fields are securely hidden using private static modifiers and exposed safely through public accessors.
Version:
2.0 (Sprint 2)
Author:
Donia Ahmed

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    clearSession()
    Clears all active session attributes, effectively logging out the current user and resetting any temporary flight selections.
    static User
    getLoggedInUser()
    Retrieves the currently active user in the session.
    static int
    getSelectedFlightId()
    Gets the ID of the flight actively selected by the customer for booking.
    static void
    setLoggedInUser(User user)
    Stores the currently authenticated user into the global session.
    static void
    setSelectedFlightId(int flightId)
    Globally sets or updates the flight identifier chosen during the flight search process.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • UserSession

      public UserSession()

  • Method Details

    • clearSession

      public static void clearSession()
      Clears all active session attributes, effectively logging out the current user and resetting any temporary flight selections.

    • setLoggedInUser

      public static void setLoggedInUser(User user)
      Stores the currently authenticated user into the global session.
      Parameters:
      user - the polymorphic User object (can be an Admin or Customer)

    • getLoggedInUser

      public static User getLoggedInUser()
      Retrieves the currently active user in the session.

      OOP Note: تعيد هذه الدالة كائن من نوع User (الكلاس الأب)، مما يسمح للنظام بمعاملة المستخدم الحالي بمرونة وتحديد صلاحياته ديناميكياً (Polymorphism).

      Returns:
      the logged-in User object, or null if no active session exists

    • getSelectedFlightId

      public static int getSelectedFlightId()
      Gets the ID of the flight actively selected by the customer for booking.
      Returns:
      the integer selected flight ID

    • setSelectedFlightId

      public static void setSelectedFlightId(int flightId)
      Globally sets or updates the flight identifier chosen during the flight search process.
      Parameters:
      flightId - the target flight database reference identifier
